downsides: Complex stakeholder matrix: General Director, Construction Manager, HSE Head, and client
idealTraits: Multi-site operations leadership with P&L ownership
HSE culture builder, not just compliance
Client relationship management at senior level

reveal.hiredOutcome: Released after 5 months: strong client presence but failed to build operational systems, no SOPs created, supply chain costs increased 14%, HSE audit flagged 3 major non-conformances under his watch
reveal.tenerOutcome: 22 months, zero LTI, built complete SOP library, reduced supply costs 19%, all client contracts renewed. Promoted to Regional Operations Director
